name: Shurjoka
involvement_summary: Shurjoka is a German streamer and YouTuber with whom KuchenTV had a long-running public feud. KuchenTV dedicated over 280 videos to Shurjoka on his main channel between February 2023 and August 2024, describing it as a 'YouTube beef' that was financially beneficial for both. They had direct confrontations and accusations, including allegations of harassment and pressure. This led to KuchenTV being banned from Twitch for 7 days in December 2023. The conflict was featured in the ZDF Magazin Royale episode 'Gaming Communitys: Der letzte unpolitische Ort auf Erden' in September 2024. KuchenTV has directly met and interacted with Shurjoka through various online platforms and public disputes.
